multi_step: Task is to identify a gate type from a figure, which at minimum requires visual interpretation plus mapping to one of the listed gate categories

registry_passed=true, so the main assets are registered

decision_reasons: Question, answer, and one existing image asset are all present, so the core semantics appear recoverable.

The metadata issues indicate provenance/path gaps rather than absence of the actual usable assets.
